languages.text: Этот бедолага так и не нашел выхода из Музеона. Сейчас скарабеи облепили его, затягивая очищенную кость странным жидким металлом.
This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.
languages.original_text: Этот бедолага так и не нашел выхода из Музеона. Сейчас скарабеи облепили его, затягивая очищенную кость странным жидким металлом.

traits.locale_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.
This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.
This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

languages.text: 这可怜的家伙终究没能离开陈列馆。甲虫已经爬满他的全身，仿佛在他裸露白骨上覆盖了一层奇异的液态金属。
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: 这可怜的家伙终究没能离开陈列馆。甲虫已经爬满他的全身，仿佛在他裸露白骨上覆盖了一层奇异的液态金属。

languages.text: El pobre desdichado no llegó a salir del Museion. Los escarabajos lo abrumaron y cubrieron sus huesos descarnados de un extraño metal líquido.
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: El pobre desdichado no llegó a salir del Museion. Los escarabajos lo abrumaron y cubrieron sus huesos descarnados de un extraño metal líquido.

languages.text: Ce pauvre hère s'est égaré dans le Muséion et n'a jamais retrouvé son chemin. Les scarabées ont festoyé sur son cadavre, laissant un étrange métal liquide sur ses os mis à nu.
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: Ce pauvre hère s'est égaré dans le Muséion et n'a jamais retrouvé son chemin. Les scarabées ont festoyé sur son cadavre, laissant un étrange métal liquide sur ses os mis à nu.

languages.text: Bu zavallı adam, Museion'dan çıkış yolunu asla bulamamış. Skarablar üzerine üşüşmüş ve etinden sıyrılmış kemiklerini tuhaf bir sıvı metalle kaplamış.
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: Bu zavallı adam, Museion'dan çıkış yolunu asla bulamamış. Skarablar üzerine üşüşmüş ve etinden sıyrılmış kemiklerini tuhaf bir sıvı metalle kaplamış.

languages.text: Dieser arme Kerl hat nie aus dem Museion herausgefunden. Die Skarabäen haben sich auf ihn gestürzt und seine Knochen mit einem seltsamen flüssigen Metall überzogen.
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: Dieser arme Kerl hat nie aus dem Museion herausgefunden. Die Skarabäen haben sich auf ihn gestürzt und seine Knochen mit einem seltsamen flüssigen Metall überzogen.

languages.text: この気の毒な男は、ミュゼイオンから脱出することができなかった。 スカラベが彼に群がり、彼の骨を剥ぎ取った後に、奇妙な液体金属で覆った。
languages.original_text: This poor fellow never found his way out of the Museion. The scarabs have swarmed over him, coating his stripped bone in strange liquid metal.

traits.locale_text: この気の毒な男は、ミュゼイオンから脱出することができなかった。 スカラベが彼に群がり、彼の骨を剥ぎ取った後に、奇妙な液体金属で覆った。
